## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `codeweave ...`
2. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 WSL2]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g. 22.0.0] (`node --version`)
- **codeweave version**: [e.g. 0.1.0] (`codeweave --version`)
- **AI client**: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Zed]

## Config file

```js
// paste your codeweave.config.js here (remove any sensitive paths)
```

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem here.
